title: Cinematic Action Hero
prompt: Gritty cinematic poster, black background with red grunge texture and film grain. Double exposure composition: Large close-up of a South Indian man's intense face and eye on left, monochrome with red rim lighting. Overlaid on right: full body of same bearded man in rolled-sleeve shirt and pants, holding a combat knife, looking back over shoulder. Dramatic red backlighting outlining hair and clothes. Large vertical red stylized text behind the figure with cracked texture.

title: Velvet Lounge Editorial
prompt: Ultra-realistic high-fashion editorial, young man with messy hair over the eye, lounging casually on a luxurious velvet sofa in modern studio. Wearing silk ivory shirt half-open with layered necklaces, paired with cream tailored pants. Soft golden light and blurred chandelier glow in background. Elegant, classy, trending editorial. 100% Real Face 8K Resolution.

title: The Godfather Noir Portrait
prompt:
Use the uploaded photo as the facial reference.

Create an ultra-photorealistic, cinematic portrait of the same person. The face, hairstyle, skin tone, facial features, and identity must match the uploaded image exactly with high facial accuracy and natural skin texture.

The subject is seated confidently on an elegant dark brown leather Chesterfield sofa inside a luxurious private lounge. He wears a perfectly tailored black three-piece suit, a crisp white dress shirt with the top two buttons open, polished black leather Oxford shoes, a premium stainless-steel luxury watch, and sophisticated black sunglasses. His posture is calm yet commanding—one leg crossed over the other, one arm resting naturally on the sofa, projecting confidence, intelligence, and effortless authority.

The room is grand and atmospheric, featuring deep matte-black walls, subtle wood paneling, antique décor, warm amber lighting, and a magnificent crystal chandelier casting soft cinematic highlights. Behind him hangs an elegant gothic-inspired oil painting featuring a mysterious hooded skull figure, adding a luxurious noir aesthetic without overpowering the scene.

Soft rays of light filter through the room, creating volumetric lighting with subtle haze. Rich shadows, realistic reflections, premium textures, and natural depth of field produce a high-end editorial look. Every material—leather, fabric, wood, metal, and glass—should appear incredibly realistic.

The overall composition should resemble a luxury magazine cover or a scene from a high-budget Hollywood crime drama. The image should communicate power, success, mystery, and quiet confidence rather than aggression.

Style:
• Ultra photorealistic
• Hollywood cinematic
• Luxury editorial photography
• Dark noir aesthetic
• Hyper-detailed (8K quality)
• Premium color grading
• HDR lighting
• Realistic skin texture
• Natural facial proportions
• Sharp focus with creamy background bokeh

Camera:
• Eye-level perspective
• Symmetrical composition
• 85mm portrait lens
• f/1.8 aperture
• Shallow depth of field
• Soft cinematic rim lighting
• Professional studio quality

Color Palette:
Deep blacks, dark mahogany, charcoal gray, warm amber, subtle gold highlights, rich contrast.

Expression:
Calm, composed, confident, intelligent, powerful, elite, mysterious.

Important:
- Preserve the uploaded face exactly.
- Do not alter facial identity.
- Maintain realistic proportions.
- Avoid cartoon, CGI, plastic skin, over-sharpening, distorted hands, extra fingers, blurred face, low resolution, artifacts, text, logos, watermarks, or unrealistic anatomy.

Aspect Ratio:
4:5 (preferred) or 3:2 vertical.

Final result should look like an authentic luxury fashion editorial photograph captured with a professional full-frame camera—not an obvious AI-generated image.

title: Golden Goddess – Radha Inspired Portrait
prompt:
Use my uploaded photo as the exact facial reference. Preserve my facial identity, facial structure, skin details, and natural likeness while transforming me into a breathtaking divine Radha-inspired celestial muse.

Create an ultra-photorealistic, luxury editorial portrait in a vertical 9:16 composition, tightly framed from the upper shoulders to the top of the head. The portrait should evoke timeless Indian spirituality, divine elegance, and heavenly beauty.

Face & Expression:
Maintain my exact facial identity while enhancing it with flawless luminous porcelain-fair skin featuring realistic pores, soft natural texture, and a radiant golden glow. Give me large expressive hazel-green eyes gazing slightly upward toward the side with emotion and serenity. Long naturally curled eyelashes, perfectly shaped eyebrows, glossy peach-nude lips slightly parted, delicate feminine facial contours, and a peaceful romantic expression that radiates grace, devotion, and divinity.

Hair:
Long dark brown-black silky hair flowing freely in soft luxurious waves around the shoulders. A few wispy strands naturally cross the face in the foreground, creating depth and realism.

Traditional Divine Adornments:
Adorn me with exquisite handcrafted Indian royal jewelry inspired by Goddess Radha:
• Elaborate pearl-and-24K-gold maang tikka crown
• Multiple pearl chains gracefully draped across the hairline
• Elegant dangling pearl side chains framing the face
• Traditional delicate nath (nose ring) with tiny pearls
• Layered pearl-and-gold earrings
• Richly detailed royal gold choker featuring emeralds, rubies, diamonds, and embedded pearls
Every ornament should appear museum-quality, luxurious, highly detailed, reflective, and illuminated by warm golden light.

Makeup:
Soft-glam bridal makeup with shimmering champagne eyeshadow, subtle eyeliner, glowing skin, luminous highlighter, natural blush, soft contouring, glossy peach lips, and beautifully blended cosmetics that appear realistic rather than overdone.

Sacred Artistic Details:
Delicate devotional face art consisting of tiny white and soft pink sacred dots painted symmetrically across the forehead, eyebrows, temples, and upper cheeks. The design should resemble authentic traditional Radha devotional art with refined elegance.

Spiritual Elements:
A softly blurred peacock feather appears in the foreground along the left edge of the frame, instantly recognizable yet out of focus, symbolizing Lord Krishna. Add faint floating golden dust particles and subtle glowing light orbs to enhance the mystical atmosphere.

Lighting:
Magical golden-hour sunset lighting enters dramatically from the right side, casting warm cinematic highlights across the face, hair, and jewelry. Soft rim lighting outlines the silhouette while gentle volumetric rays create a heavenly glow. Jewelry should sparkle naturally with realistic reflections, while the skin exhibits beautiful subsurface scattering.

Background:
Dreamy shallow depth of field with warm amber, golden-brown, and soft cream bokeh. The background should remain elegant, uncluttered, and softly blurred to emphasize the portrait.

Photography Style:
Luxury Vogue editorial portrait meets timeless Indian devotional art. Captured using an 85mm f/1.2 portrait lens with ultra-shallow depth of field, cinematic color grading, HDR lighting, ultra-high dynamic range, hyper-realistic skin rendering, natural filmic contrast, realistic reflections, crisp focus on the eyes, premium fashion photography quality.

Mood:
Divine, ethereal, mystical, serene, regal, romantic, emotionally captivating, celestial, graceful, sacred, and timeless.

Quality:
Masterpiece, ultra-photorealistic, 16K detail, hyper-realistic skin texture, realistic hair strands, natural eye reflections, cinematic composition, museum-quality jewelry, volumetric lighting, award-winning portrait photography, perfect facial symmetry, premium editorial finish, no artifacts, no distortion, no over-processing.

title: Neon Vision: The Portrait
prompt: Use the uploaded reference image to create an ultra-realistic, cinematic 8K portrait. Match the face, hairstyle, and body exactly. The young man is wearing a fitted black shirt and holding glowing neon text reading "AI Prompt Book" in one hand, styled like the Instagram logo typography with a premium modern gradient. The scene is dark with dramatic low-key lighting, where the glowing text is the primary light source, illuminating his face and hand. High contrast, sharp focus, realistic skin texture, natural pose, shallow depth of field, premium studio photography, ultra-detailed, photorealistic, luxury cinematic look.

title: Echoes of the Fog
prompt: Ultra-cinematic, photorealistic 9:16 ultrawide low-angle shot of a confident young man standing in the same outdoor location, casually leaning against a tall, weathered concrete gate. He is dressed in a crisp white open-collar cargo shirt with rolled-up sleeves and black oversized baggy cargo pants, creating a modern streetwear aesthetic. Lush green branches naturally frame the scene, with aged barbed wire running along the top of the gate. The rain-soaked ground reflects soft ambient light, enhancing the fresh post-rain atmosphere. In the background, preserve the misty forest pathway, fading into dense fog for depth and mystery. Soft diffused overcast lighting, subtle drifting mist, cinematic depth of field, realistic wet textures, natural color grading, volumetric fog, premium editorial fashion photography, dramatic perspective, ultra-detailed skin and fabric textures, HDR, 8K, Sony A1, 50mm lens, f/1.8, shallow depth of field, moody, dreamy, atmospheric, highly realistic.

title: Neon Contrast
prompt: A young woman sitting confidently on a wooden stool against a dark smoky background with red and blue lighting effects. She has long wavy hair styled to one side, wearing a white V-neck t-shirt, blue jeans, and a denim jacket draped casually over her arm. The lighting creates a cinematic contrast — red glow on one side and blue on the other — adding a dramatic, modern portrait vibe. The background features soft smoke blending with the lights for a moody, stylish atmosphere. Studio portrait photography, sharp focus, realistic skin tones, soft shadows, high-quality Gemini AI photo editing style. I want exact woman same face as, I uploaded no alteration 100% same. Ratio 9:16.
